scope: PDO PostgreSQL driver discovery through pdo_drivers and PDO::getAvailableDrivers
generated Pdo\\Pgsql and PDO_PGSql_Ext class metadata
pgsql: host, port, dbname, user, password, and sslmode DSN parsing through PostgresConnectOptions
no-live PostgreSQL PDO constructor failure as PDOException
opt-in live pgsql: PDO DSN query, errmode exception, prepared statement, fetch mode, and transaction smoke when PHRUST_POSTGRES_TEST_DSN is set
non_scope: large objects, notifications, copy helpers, and libpq parity
target_gates: nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime pdo_pgsql -- --nocapture
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime pgsql -- --nocapture
PHPT_REUSE_LAST=0 PHPT_DEV_REUSE_TARGET_PASS=0 nix develop -c just phpt-dev-module MODULE=pdo_pgsql
next_step: Promote upstream pdo_pgsql statement and type-conversion PHPTs once array/json/bytea/cursor metadata parity is implemented.
